nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to creative ownership
nodes.grounding_span: I love the ease of brainstorming and research with AI

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool for content creation
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary or banned tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI is such an efficiency tool and can save oodles amount of time

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I am attempting to feed my stories into AI in chunks to see if it can help create a better product

nodes.label: Human control over creative decisions
nodes.label_negative: AI-generated outlines and loss of creative control
nodes.grounding_span: The outline is everything. You have to have a solid outline with a definite direction to follow

nodes.label: AI alignment with author's vision and context
nodes.label_negative: AI deviation from intended setting and story
nodes.grounding_span: AI keeps trying to switch the location from [REDACTED] to [REDACTED]

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: I have to have creative control or it isn't my work

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: get things accomplished in one day that used to take me a week

nodes.label: Quality and well-rounded content
nodes.grounding_span: I like to make everything as well rounded as possible

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I feel very satisfied that I can get things accomplished in one day that used to take me a week

nodes.label: Frustration with company restrictions on AI
nodes.grounding_span: When I work for companies that do not allow it, I get very frustrated

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: Most of its opinions are not very good

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: In time I may give it more allowance to create

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — works back and forth with AI
nodes.grounding_span: Through questions, I get the AI to look at my idea from different angles

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — separates creative from non-creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I tell it to get back on track
